posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Florida’s DEI crackdown bill passes the Senate 25-11. The measure bans local governments from using taxpayer dollars to fund or promote diversity, equity, & inclusion programs.

twitter.content:
JUST IN: After hours of heated questions and debate, Florida’s DEI crackdown bill passes the Senate on a 25-11 vote

The measure, sponsored by Sen. @Clay_Yarborough, bans local governments from using taxpayer dollars to fund or promote diversity, equity, and inclusion programs.
